abilities: I'm not done yet. (on low HP)
You're not taking me down! (on low HP)
Ngh... Get out of my head!
chatter: I'll put it all on the line.
So, what's on the docket? Winning, I hope...
We'll give it all we've got, and hope that's enough.
We'll make it out alive. Maybe even in one piece.
I wasn't expecting a reunion... (with multiple former Overwatch agents on the team)
Just stick to the plan, and we're golden.
Let's be more than they bargained for.
Watch each other's backs out there.
Not bad, but we haven't won yet.
If we want another chance, we're going to have to make one.
We have what it takes. Keep at it!
Last shot. Let's bring it home.
One last chance. Let's not waste it.
I've gotten back up from worse.
Guess she really does mean business. (eliminated by Domina )
Not surprised I ended up on her bad side. (eliminated by Vendetta )
Might need some company out there.
Haha! Don't get in my way.
Let's see how long I burn.
I like the look of that.
Time to change up the strategy.
Superior upgrade installed. (while using Override Protocol)
Weapon enhancements enabled. (while using Override Protocol)
They revived one. Guess they didn't take the hint.
Hostile life form reawakened. (while using Override Protocol)
call-outs: Engaging hostile forces. (while using Override Protocol)
Hostile forces outnumber allied units. (while using Override Protocol)
Hostile sniper detected. (while using Override Protocol)
Hostile turret identified. (while using Override Protocol)
No one's going to stop me!
Augmenting combot protocol. (while using Override Protocol)
Damage capability upgraded. (while using Override Protocol)
I'll be impressed if we screw this up now.
Not long now. Hold out and we win!
Mission status: success imminent. (while using Override Protocol)
Keep moving! They won't win this.
Time's running out. Don't let up!
We aren't giving up. Push through!
eliminations: Not how you wanted this to go, huh?
Sure you're cut out for this?
There's more where that came from.
Hey, we all make mistakes. (eliminating Ana , Reaper or Soldier: 76 )
You cursed, or just clumsy? (eliminating Mizuki )
You don't hold my leash. (eliminating Vendetta )
We weren't both going to make it.
Ooh. Could have been cleaner. (on low HP)
Eh, it was a good try. (eliminating any hero using ultimate ability)
Did your worst, but I'm the best. (eliminating any hero using ultimate ability)
You're joking, right? (eliminating any hero using ultimate ability)
Where do you think you're going? (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
That was easier than you make it look. (eliminating Ana with a headshot)
Security threat eliminated. (eliminating Sombra while Hacked)
Just can't stop once I get going.
How's my bounty looking? *chuckle* (with Freja on the team)
Sent them packing... more or less.
All threats eliminated. (while using Override Protocol)
(Turkish) There's no problem anymore. (while using Override Protocol)
Don't make an enemy you can't beat.
Hostile turret destroyed. (while using Override Protocol)
If you're trying to impress me, it's working.
Looks easy when you do it!
You're making me look bad out there!
Could never fault your aim, Captain. (to Ana )
You sure you need my help? (to Vendetta )
interactions: Cassidy : Was a little jealous of you back in the day, you know. Always made everything look so easy. Emre : That's funny. I felt the same about you. Cassidy : *chuckles* I don't buy that for a minute. Emre : Coming from the black-ops cowboy? Yeah, right.

Domina : Oh, another one of Marzia's lackeys. Let's hope you're not as dim as the rest. Emre : You're insulting me? In those shoes? Domina : Darling! These cost more than fifty of you. Emre : Guess you can't buy good taste.

Emre : All that time not knowing where I was, and this is how you finally find me... I'm sorry, Frej. Freja : It's all right. Could've been worse ways to find you. Emre : Yeah, but... it's still pretty bad, right? Freja : *soft chuckle* Definitely could've been better.
Emre : I'm still not used to seeing you on the front lines. Freja : Not used to being outperformed, you mean? Emre : *chuckles* That a challenge, Frej? Freja : Oh, it's hardly a challenge.
Emre : So... you work alone now? Freja : Yeah. Been that way a while. Emre : You did your best work on a team. This isn't like you, Frej. Freja : A lot's changed, Emre. For both of us.

Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] Freja : It looks that way. Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] (one of two): Emre : We're a package deal, V. If you want me, you put your trust in her. Freja : Keep paying my price, and it's a sign of whatever you'd like.

Mauga : Haven't seen you in a while, Emmy. Where have you been? Emre : Nowhere you need to know about. Mauga : *groans* I thought all that time away might chill you out, but you're still the same old killjoy. Emre : If that means I'm still on your bad side, I'll take it as a good sign.
Sigma : What becomes of you, when your mind is not your own? Emre : I don't know. I'm here one moment, and then... nothing. Sigma : Ah... Then I suppose you are more fortunate than most.

Emre : Vendetta 's got you under lock and key, huh? You must have really set her off. Sigma : She claimed I am "a threat to myself and others"... though I cannot recall why. Emre : Yeah. I know the feeling.

Sojourn : Whatever Talon has on you... we can help. You just have to tell me what's going on. Emre : How many years did we work together, Viv? You should know if I'm not telling you something, I've got a good reason.

Sojourn : So, you finally made it. How's retirement going? Emre : *chuckle* Not bad. A few more firefights than I planned for. Sojourn : You seem prepared to me. Emre : Well, next time, I'm packing less heat, and more sunscreen.

Sombra : Give it up, güey. You think I don't know who you're really working for? Emre : What makes you think I know? Sombra : *scoff* Please. Don't play dumb with me. Emre : *exasperated chuckle* No "playing". Just dumb.
Emre : Didn't expect this winning smile, did you? *sigh* Max always undersells my looks. Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] Emre : *chuckle* I get that a lot, too.
map-specific: You know, I always want to retire here.
Overwatch crossed a line here. And the world paid the price.
Always figured I'd end up back here. Just... not like this.
